comment.body: NVDA again rejected from below the 2Jan2024 VWAP that has been support on every big sell since.  That's the heavier blue line.  The  first yellow circle shows where it found support March 31 (this is a 30min chart).  Since it lost it on April 3, has been rejected from below (middle and right circles).   Will be interesting to see if it can regain that level, or how it reacts if we see consolidation and support into April OpEx.  Currently at 104.93.
